evidence_summary: Establish the Scarecrow's transition from a companion to a formal ruler of the Emerald City. The scene must pivot the group dynamic from mourning to active problem-solving through the introduction of a mechanical/magical solution involving the Golden Cap.

The Scarecrow, now acting as ruler, convenes a meeting with the travelers. Dorothy states her goal of returning to Kansas, leading the Scarecrow to suggest using the Golden Cap to summon the Winged Monkeys for flight.
The group is gathered in a state of heavy, quiet melancholy.
The group shifts toward focused, hopeful determination.
The_scarecrow proposes using the Golden Cap to summon Winged Monkeys for flight.
